name: Needs external lookup
description: True when answering the request requires live external information (web search, current events, fresh data) beyond the model's training cut-off.
systemPrompt: Answering the upstream request well requires live, time-sensitive information from outside the model's training corpus — for example: today's weather or news, current prices, schedules, scores, version numbers, status of a deployed system, or any other fact that can plausibly change after $DATE.
